title: Actron's Guided Busway
description: A guided busway/track mod for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod
body:
**Disclaimer** This is my first project, and it is possible that there may be issues, anyway- 

Hello there this is Actron, so I assume you're here because you want to build a guided busway in your Minecraft world but don't know how to model for yourself or can't find any mods that add a guided busway to MTR? well you're in the right place! 

Say hello to Actron's Guided Busway as explained above there is an unfortunate lack of mods that add a Guided bus way to MTR, so I decided to fix that problem myself as I wanted to make my own guided busway. 

At this time, I have more content planned for this mod in the near future so keep an eye out on Modrinth and the MTR Content DB, I very much hope you enjoy this project of mine and I'll see you on the rails. 

~ Astron 

One final thing if you found my mod through having a random nosy through Modrinth or if you have just started out this mod requires [MTR](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway/versions) to function properly
